ogTitle: South Turramurra vs South West Rocks: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in South Turramurra and South West Rocks.
heading: South Turramurra vs South West Rocks — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between South Turramurra, New South Wales and South West Rocks, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: South West Rocks has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to South Turramurra (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is South Turramurra or South West Rocks safer from flooding?
faq.answer: South Turramurra has a flood risk score of 26/100, while South West Rocks scores 33/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: South Turramurra scores 26/100 for bushfire risk. South West Rocks scores 40/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in South Turramurra or South West Rocks?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. South West Rocks has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.3% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
